game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Bus Simulator:** Players control officially licensed buses using a virtual steering wheel or tilt controls for steering, and virtual pedals for acceleration and braking, navigating a detailed open-world city named Havensburg. The core gameplay involves driving along predefined routes, adhering to traffic laws and schedules, stopping precisely at designated bus stops to pick up and drop off passengers. Successfully completing routes and campaign missions, which might include objectives like "Complete Route 101 in under 15 minutes with zero accidents," earns the player credits and experience points. Credits are used to purchase new bus models from 10 licensed manufacturers (e.g., Mercedes-Benz, Volvo), unlock additional city districts (e.g., port, old town), and expand the public transport network by activating new routes. Progression is tied to completing missions to unlock content and accumulating credits to build a thriving bus company, with the ultimate goal being to acquire all bus types and establish the most extensive transport network in Havensburg.
game_info.description: Navigate your bus through the bustling city of Havensburg! Pick up and drop off passengers at designated stops while following traffic rules. Complete routes within time limits to earn credits and unlock new buses and districts. Build your bus empire by expanding routes and maintaining a perfect safety record. Your goal: unlock all bus types and establish the most extensive transport network in the city!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Steer left/right and accelerate/brake
Space: Emergency brake
Shift: Honk horn (signal to pedestrians)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)
Enter: Start game from start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic driving mechanics and collision detection. Validates that the bus can move forward, turn, and interact with the game world boundaries without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Drive the bus forward while making gentle turns. Test acceleration and braking responses. Navigate through the street without hitting obstacles or boundaries.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Bus should move smoothly, respond to input commands, and properly detect collisions with boundaries. No errors should occur during basic movement operations.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by completing a full route successfully. Validates passenger pickup/dropoff mechanics, time management, and route completion logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the designated route markers, stop at each bus stop to pick up and drop off passengers. Drive efficiently to complete the route within the time limit while maintaining traffic rules.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete the route within time, pick up all passengers, drop them off at correct stops, and trigger GAME_OVER_WIN condition. Earn credits and unlock progression.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests movement variety and obstacle avoidance. Validates that the bus can navigate complex scenarios including traffic, pedestrians, and tight turns.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Drive through various parts of the city, encounter different obstacles, test emergency brake functionality, and validate proper stopping mechanics at bus stops.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Bus navigates successfully around obstacles, stops precisely at bus stops, and maintains stable physics throughout various driving scenarios.
